exploration_notes: The producer record flow traces through 6 key source files: (1) ProducerRecord.java defines the record POJO. (2) KafkaProducer.doSend() serializes the record and calls accumulator.append() (line 1029). (3) RecordAccumulator.append() (line 275) buffers the record into a ProducerBatch. (4) RecordAccumulator.ready() (line 763) checks which nodes have batches ready to send, returning a ReadyCheckResult. (5) RecordAccumulator.drain() (line 954) extracts batches per node for sending.
